top_signals.title: Trump’s Iran deal is better than ongoing war
top_signals.summary: The president has made many errors in his policy towards Tehran, but signing the MOU isn’t one of them
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: RH, the $3bn furniture brand, has moved into Mayfair
top_signals.summary: As part of a global rollout, the US homeware behemoth now resides at a lavish London address
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hackers Used Meta’s AI Support Bot to Seize Instagram Accounts
top_signals.summary: The Instagram accounts for the Obama White House and the Chief Master Sergeant of the U.S. Space Force were briefly defaced with pro-Iranian images and messages over the weekend, after instructions began circulating on Telegram showing how to trick Meta's "AI support assistant" bot into resetting account passwords.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hemlo boosts M&I resources 34% at Ontario gold mine
top_signals.summary: The resource update “reinforces our thesis of unlocking value through reinvestment,” TD Securities mining analyst says.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Wesdome grows reserve base to support production through 2033
top_signals.summary: The Canadian gold miner said the combined reserve count across its two operations has risen by 17% to a record 1.4 million oz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Endurance Gold hits high-grade step-outs at Reliance project
top_signals.summary: The company plans to begin a preliminary economic assessment this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Alleged Kimwolf Botmaster ‘Dort’ Arrested, Charged in U.S. and Canada
top_signals.summary: Canadian authorities on Wednesday arrested a 23-year-old Ottawa man on suspicion of building and operating Kimwolf, a fast spreading Internet-of-Things botnet that enslaved millions of devices for use in a series of massive distributed denial-of-service (DDoS) attacks over the past six months. KrebsOnSecurity publicly named the suspect in February 2026 after the accused launched a volley of DDoS, doxing and swatting campaigns against this author and a security researcher. He now faces criminal hacking charges in both Canada and the United States.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
